title: Pack of 2 Oasis Naylorbase Plastic Based Floral Foam Ring 31cm (12")
features: Pack of 2 x 12 inch (31cm) genuine Oasis Naylorbase plastic backed wreath rings
5cm deep Maxlife foam giving up to 50% longer flower life, quick saturation and low drainage
Super strong injection moulded recycled and recyclable plastic base
Production has changed - you may receive the green plastic tray or the new recycled black plastic tray
description: Product Description OASIS® NAYLORBASE® Plastic Backed Floral Foam Rings are great for creating funeral coffin-top arrangements, table decorations, gift flowers and Christmas Displays. Developed in 1975 these bases were initially invented for funeral work. These days their versatility has made it one of the most popular floristry tools for every type of floristry. OASIS® NAYLORBASE® Floral Bases offer total design versatility and guarantee perfect holding conditions for your designs. Ready to use, there is no time wasting prep to slow you down. Since their earliest days in 1954, when V.L. Smithers revolutionised the floral industry with the creation of water-absorbing foam for florists, Smithers-Oasis has grown into a leading global manufacturer and marketer of floral foam, floral accessory products, cellular growing media, and postharvest products. Today, OASIS® is the most recognised and trusted brand in the floral industry.Made from OASIS® Brand Floral Foam Maxlife which offers consistent quality, the OASIS® Casket Tray has an injection moulded base which provides supreme strength and stability. With a plastic lip to provide support for foliage and ribbon and pre-applied anti-slip feet for fantastic grip, the OASIS® Casket Tray makes small work of large arrangements. Safety Warning This artificial plant contains materials that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions in some individuals. Handle with care and wash hands after handling. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Box Contains 2 x OASIS® NAYLOBASE® Plastic Backed Floral Foam Ring 31cm(12") See more
